Code fragment: public final TableField<EmployeeRecord, Boolean> ISFIRED = createField(DSL.name("isfired"), SQLDataType.BOOLEAN.defaultValue(DSL.field(DSL.raw("false"), SQLDataType.BOOLEAN)), this, "");
Explanation: The 'isfired' column has a default value of 'false' but is marked as NULLABLE, which means it can never be NULL in practice since new records will default to false. Consider making this column NOT NULL explicitly to reflect its actual usage.
